mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( reporter_idx, reported_idx, post_idx, report_content, target_type, report_status, report_created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporter_idx}, #{reported_idx}, #{post_idx}, #{report_content}, #{target_type}, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_status = 0 AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_status = 1 AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE target_type = 'POST' AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE target_type = 'COMMENT' AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
